description: In a casual slip-on style with absolute visual appeal, these shoes from id make a perfect addition to your casual wardrobe. The smooth synthetic leather upper and stitch detailing gives it a rugged look, making it a fabulous buy.UpperSmooth synthetic leather upper that have overlays with adjustable velcro closures for a customised FitSlip-on style for ease of wearPerforations and a suede overlay on the heel cup to offer all day comfort and styleRemovable padded sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleEVA Midsole for impact protectionPerforations on the midfoot for absolute comfortOutsoleTPR Outsole with strategically placed multi-directional lugs and grooves throughout for absolute grip and tractionOutsole reinforced on the upper for enhanced durabilityshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
